description_long: This object is a stylized, cartoonish raccoon standing upright on a round, stone-textured base. Its body is plump and smooth, with a large, rounded belly and a bushy, ringed tail that curves to the side. The raccoon has exaggerated facial features, including large, bulging green eyes, a wide mouth with prominent fangs, and a pointed snout. Its fur is primarily a muted grayish-green, with darker accents on the tail rings, ears, and around the eyes, forming a classic raccoon mask. The ears are large, triangular, and set high on the head, while the limbs are short with small, black paws. Whiskers and subtle fur details add to the character's expressive and whimsical appearance.
description: A stylized, upright cartoon raccoon with a plump body, large green eyes, and a bushy ringed tail, standing on a stone-textured base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raccoon's wide eyes, toothy grin, and full facial mask pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pointed snout, ear profile, and the curve of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the full length and rings of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the facial profile, fangs, and the tail's attachment to the body.
attribute_facial_mask_pattern: The raccoon's facial mask is a dark gray, sharply defined area encircling both eyes and extending toward the sides of the face, with a smooth, symmetrical boundary and no visible asymmetries. The mask contrasts distinctly with the lighter fur on the snout and forehead, accentuating the large, green eyes.
attribute_ringed_tail: The tail is thick and bushy, featuring three wide, evenly spaced dark gray rings alternating with lighter gray bands, creating a high-contrast, regular pattern. The rings are consistent in width and wrap fully around the tail, with no visible irregularities.
attribute_posture: The raccoon is depicted standing upright on its hind legs with its arms slightly bent and relaxed at its sides.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are large, upright, and triangular with pointed tips, set symmetrically on top of the head and featuring subtle inner fur details.
attribute_paw_structure: Each paw is small and black with five visible digits, ending in subtle claws and minimal fur coverage.
